title: Orange Town Under Buggy’s Shadow
description: On pages 0–3, the Orange Town conflict focuses on Buggy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, with Buggy’s occupation testing Luffy, Zoro, Nami, and the townspeople.
scene: This part follows the pressure inside Orange Town as Buggy’s crew, the Straw Hats, and the people caught between them react to the escalating fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: HEY ZOLO! GET ME OUTTA HERE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: THEIR CAPTAIN: GETS KILLED AND THEY JUST LAUGH ABOUT IT?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WE CAN'T OPEN THIS WITHOUT A KEY.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: These bars are too thick for me to cut through.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Har Har hair her hair her hair her! I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now hand over the keys to this cage before I get cranky.

summary: The scene keeps the Orange Town arc moving by tying the immediate battle to the town’s fear, Nami’s motives, and Luffy’s instinct to answer cruelty directly.
